access_token.description: Google OAuth 2.0 access token with Admin SDK Directory read scope. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged. Acquisition/refresh is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it) -- see docs.md Known limits.

base_url.description: Google Admin SDK Directory API base URL override for tests or proxies.

customer_id.description: Google Workspace customer id. 'my_customer' (the default) resolves to the caller's own customer, matching legacy's default.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages fetched per stream. A positive integer, or 'all'/'unlimited' (default) for no cap.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
